profile.name: Mauricio Obando
profile.title: AI-Ready Data Engineer
profile.subtitle: Building cloud pipelines, analytics systems, and practical AI workflows.
profile.about: Senior data engineer with 7+ years across cloud architecture, production pipelines, analytics platforms, and AI-assisted delivery.
skills: Cloud data platforms on AWS and GCP
Python, SQL, Spark, and DBT pipelines
profile.bio: Passionate about leveraging the power of data and the cloud to drive meaningful insights and innovation.

experience.description: Public LinkedIn profile currently lists Globant as the active company, with Mauricio positioned around modern data engineering and AI-oriented delivery.
highlights: Public LinkedIn profile shows Globant as the current employer.
Focused on practical AI workflows, cloud-native delivery, and modern data engineering.

experience.description: Worked with AWS customers on architecture reliability, Well-Architected guidance, cost optimization, and cloud intelligence practices.
highlights: Delivered recommendations across resiliency, security, and operational excellence.
Built cost and usage visibility workflows with Python, Athena, Glue, S3, and QuickSight.
Supported migrations and service adoption with architecture guidance tailored to client workloads.

experience.description: Designed and operated high-value data pipelines, dashboard architectures, and marketing analytics workflows for major client programs.
highlights: Built data ingestion and transformation pipelines for Stellantis programs on AWS and GCP.
Created architecture patterns for Tableau and Looker-based insight delivery.
Developed a classification model for marketing moments to purchase from Google Ads interaction data.

projects.name: Commercial Optimization Platform
projects.summary: Platform for commercial performance optimization with cloud-native data pipelines.
projects.impact: Designed to connect revenue planning with analytics-ready cloud pipelines.

projects.name: Marketing Mix Modeling Pipelines
projects.summary: CI/CD-enabled data pipelines to train and evaluate MMM workloads.
projects.impact: Brought reproducible training and evaluation flow into marketing analytics delivery.

projects.name: LLM Observability Lab
projects.summary: Evaluation-first sandbox for tracing, scoring, and debugging LLM application behavior.
projects.impact: Turned current AI experimentation into a visible engineering narrative on the public portfolio.
